description: Lock patent_specification_drawings to formal patent specification drawings, drafts, and model references anchored to the U.S. Patent Act of 1790, not generic Renaissance invention illustrations or map engraving.

checks.reason: The source-backed scope is the 1790 U.S. Patent Act requirement for specifications accompanied by drafts or models.
The scoped artifact exists inside a statutory patent filing process, so the patent system is required rather than merely adjacent.
Specification drawings are referenced technical figures, so drawing conventions enable the disclosure format.
Map engraving is a cartographic reproduction technology, not a documented prerequisite for patent specification drawings.
